overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character navigating dark underground maintenance corridors with a flashlight. The character moves through metal-barred hallways, graffiti-covered tunnels, engages in combat with an infected creature, and explores a storage room before ascending a concrete stairwell.

events.description: character opens metal security gate and passes through

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through dark corridor, flashlight illuminating metal bars and electrical panels

gray metal electrical box with warning symbols
white square tiles covering the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow, dimly lit maintenance corridor with metal security gates and electrical panels. The flashlight beam reveals ceramic tile walls and debris scattered on the concrete floor as the character opens and passes through a barred gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered service tunnel with stairwell access

events.description: moves from tiled corridor into graffiti-covered tunnel section
infected creature bursts through door and attacks, character fires weapon
character recovers from combat and proceeds through doorway into stairwell area

agents.ego_description: engaging in close-quarters combat with an infected creature, firing handgun and dodging attacks

notable_agents.action: infected creature lunging through doorway attempting to attack the character

entered.detail: wall covered in vibrant green, pink, and yellow spray-painted tags
gray metal door with push bar leading to stairwell
concrete stairs visible through the open doorway

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a graffiti-covered tunnel where the character opens a metal door and is immediately attacked by an infected creature. After a brief combat encounter using a handgun, the character proceeds through the doorway into a concrete stairwell area.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with shelving and supplies

character searches metal locker and finds supplies

tall gray metal racks holding wooden barrels

tall metal cabinet with doors used for storage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a storage room containing wooden barrels on metal shelving units. The flashlight illuminates a wooden workbench and a metal locker, which the character opens to search for supplies while exploring the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell and upper maintenance level

events.description: character begins ascending concrete stairs to upper level
reaches top of stairs and enters upper concrete platform area

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs and exploring the upper maintenance level with metal railings

metal safety railings along the upper platform edge
large structural concrete columns supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character exits the storage room and ascends a concrete stairwell with metal railings. Upon reaching the upper level, the character explores a concrete platform area with structural pillars and safety railings, continuing to search the abandoned facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a claustrophobic underground facility that transitions from narrow maintenance corridors into an open concrete platform. It begins in a dimly lit corridor of ceramic tiles and electrical panels, moving through a barred security gate into a graffiti-covered tunnel. As the character opens a metal door, the scene shifts into a brief combat encounter with an infected creature before the camera proceeds into a confined storage room filled with wooden barrels and metal lockers. The movement then flows out of the storage area and upward along a concrete stairwell with metal railings. Finally, the environment opens up onto an upper-level concrete platform characterized by structural pillars and safety railings as the search of the abandoned facility continues.
